findings.title: Path prefix confusion in startsWith guard (FIXED during grill)
findings.issue: startsWith check without trailing separator allowed sibling directory escapes (e.g., /tmp/a + ../ab = /tmp/ab passes startsWith(/tmp/a))
findings.suggestion: Changed to resolved !== normalizedRoot && !resolved.startsWith(normalizedRoot + '/') — already fixed in commit 9d074de
findings.impact: Crafted localSkillsDir could escape to sibling directories. Low real-world risk since values come from hardcoded registry.

acValidation.AC-US2-01: PASS - path traversal guard tested (including prefix confusion fix)
